name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inconsistent cash flow forecasting causes missed opportunities for reinvestment. We automate daily cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent cash flow forecasting leads to missed opportunities for reinvestment.
features: User-friendly dashboard for cash flow visualization

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inconsistent cash flow forecasting causes missed opportunities for reinvestment. We automate daily cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking using spreadsheets.
